hypothesis: Augmenting STR-Bamba426M pretraining with an additional serialized 3D-conformer textual modality (atom-indexed XYZ tokens preserving bond connectivity) will reduce the mean absolute error on QM9 energy-related targets (U0, U298, H298, G298) by at least 15% after fine-tuning compared to the current STR-Bamba426M fine-tuned performance.
